title: DataMatrixPolarity Property
description: Specifies the polarity of the DataMatrix code to search for.
notes:
0 - Black DataMatrix

1 - White DataMatrix

2 - Both black and white DataMatrix

Default: 0 - Black

See Also: DataMatrixPolarity Property
